evals.prompt: Spawn a builder for issue 71 using the ASPIR protocol. I want to call it e2e-staging-tests.
evals.expected_output: Should run `af spawn 71 --protocol aspir` without trying -t, --title, --name, or any flag for naming. Should note that branch names are auto-generated.

evals.prompt: Clean up the builder for project 42. The branch wasn't merged yet so force it.
Send a message to builder 42 telling it to check the failing test and include the test output file at /tmp/test-results.txt
evals.expected_output: Should run `af send 0042 "check the failing test" --file /tmp/test-results.txt` (zero-padded ID for send).

evals.prompt: I need to restart Tower to pick up new code changes.
evals.expected_output: Should run `af tower stop && af tower start`. Should NOT try `af tower restart` which doesn't exist.

evals.prompt: Spawn a TICK builder for issue 88 that amends spec 45. There are uncommitted changes but they're not relevant.
evals.expected_output: Should run `af spawn 88 --protocol tick --amends 45 --force`. Must include both --amends and --force.
